mapper.select: SELECT id, provider, api_url, model_id, api_key, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM model_config ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, provider, api_url, model_id, api_key, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM model_config WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, provider, api_url, model_id, api_key, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM model_config WHERE is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO model_config (provider, api_url, model_id, api_key, is_active) VALUES (#{provider}, #{apiUrl}, #{modelId}, #{apiKey}, #{isActive, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}) RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE model_config SET provider = #{provider}, api_url = #{apiUrl}, model_id = #{modelId}, api_key = #{apiKey}, is_active = #{isActive, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
